Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights
Enclosing class:
ProcessResearchSpec
public static class ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights extends Object
Weights used to collapse process synthesis metrics into a ranking score.

  • Method Details

    • setProductFlowWeight

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights setProductFlowWeight(double productFlowWeight)
      Sets the product flow reward weight.
      Parameters:
      productFlowWeight - score per kg/hr of weighted product flow
      Returns:
      this scoring weights object

    • setPurityWeight

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights setPurityWeight(double purityWeight)
      Sets the purity reward weight.
      Parameters:
      purityWeight - score per mole-fraction purity unit
      Returns:
      this scoring weights object

      public ProcessResearchSpec.ScoringWeights setElectricPowerPenalty(double electricPowerPenalty)
      Sets the electric power penalty.
      Parameters:
      electricPowerPenalty - score penalty per kW electric power demand
      Returns:
      this scoring weights object

      this scoring weights object
